name: White Vinegar (5% Acetic Acid)
description: A clear solution of ~5% acetic acid in water, serving as a versatile household acid for cleaning, descaling, laundry, and hair care.
appearance: Clear, colorless liquid with sharp, pungent odor
solubility: Completely miscible with water in all proportions
chemistry: Dissolves mineral deposits (limescale), cuts grease, mildly antimicrobial. pH ~2.5. In laundry, neutralizes alkaline residue, softens fabric. As hair rinse, restores scalp pH.
warnings: NOT on marble/granite/stone. Not with bleach (toxic gas). Not with castile soap.
